SRNE Inverter to MQTT

Local control plane for SRNE over Modbus RTU

Single-binary bridge for polling live inverter telemetry, exposing safe write controls, and publishing Home Assistant-ready MQTT discovery topics from the local Linux host.

Loading status...
Version -
Uptime -
Auto refresh 15s

Controls

Writable inverter settings

Live controls stay at the top. Every change is written over Modbus and read back into the panel.

Configuration

YAML-backed service settings

Maintenance

Dangerous device actions

These actions can interrupt inverter operation and should only be used deliberately.

No maintenance actions exposed.
